body_txt: The Game Over Man is the character many video games show to the player after getting killed . Often he's The Grim Reaper , or a laughing Boss or Big Bad , but he's occasionally an ally mourning the hero's fall. Sometimes, he offers a " Have a Nice Death " or " It's a Wonderful Failure " message. An End-Game Results Screen will sometimes be accompanied by a Game Over Man. The trope name is a play on a line from Aliens .
